Black 2 & White 2 Pokédex

This is a list of the Pokémon from the Unova region in Pokémon Black 2 & White 2. Contrary to Pokémon Black & White, the local Pokédex in these sequels features 300 Pokémon across all generations, including every Generation 5 Pokémon.

As usual the National Dex can be obtained after beating the Elite Four, which lists the remaining Pokémon in order by generation. The Black/White Pokémon stats page shows only the new Pokémon introduced in Gen 5.

Psychic · Fire

Grass
